title: Ancient and Contemporary Philosophy Working Group
content:
Ancient and Contemporary Philosophy Working Group

Research Focus

Rethinking the Basic Concepts of Ancient Greek Philosophy through Contemporary Movements and Problems:

In this study group, in accordance with the research areas of the members of our department, research is carried out to present a holistic view of contemporary thought and the fields opened by this thought by tracing the traces of Ancient Greek Philosophy in the contemporary philosophical world.
